intro.title: Vitamin D Deficiency Detected – Supply Directly in Your Practice
intro.text1: You see it in your patients: vitamin D deficiency is widespread. With our Vitamin D3+K2 sublingual spray, you can now act directly – and provide your patient with supplementation right in your practice.
intro.text2: The spray is exclusively available through medical distribution – your patient can only get it from you.

usp.title: Double Bioavailability Through Tiny Technology
usp.text: Our sublingual spray uses innovative Tiny Technology for double bioavailability compared to conventional supplements – delivering 2,000 IU per spray, effectively absorbed through the oral mucosa.
usp.dosing_text: 1 spray daily as per manufacturer recommendation.
usp.dosing_note: A higher dosage should be discussed individually with you as the treating physician.

items.question: What is Tiny Technology?
items.answer: Tiny Technology enables double the bioavailability compared to conventional vitamin D supplements. Through sublingual absorption via the oral mucosa, the active ingredient is absorbed particularly effectively.

items.question: Why is the spray only available through medical distribution?
items.answer: The spray is deliberately available exclusively through medical distribution, so that you as a practice can offer your patients controlled, high-quality supplementation – as a logical conclusion to your treatment pathway.

items.question: How long does one bottle last?
items.answer: Each bottle contains 71 applications. At the recommended intake of one spray per day, a single bottle lasts over two months.
